name: The Ivory Sovereign Thobe
desc: Our signature ankle-length Saudi thobe in heavyweight ivory Japanese cotton. Hand-cut by a single artisan, finished over 14 working days, and signed on the inner placket. The Sovereign features our quartet collar, mother-of-pearl tarboosh and pearl-stitched cuffs.

features.d: Four-piece tailored collar with mother-of-pearl tarboosh.
60 stitches per cm in pearl-grey silk thread.
The maker's name stitched on the inside.
From cutting bench to your box, signed and dated.

accordion.body: The Sovereign sits true to size. A six-foot-one wearer with a 102 cm chest fits EU 52. For a roomier silhouette, size up one. For made-to-measure, book a 30-minute video appointment.
Dry-clean only. Press inside out on a low setting. Avoid direct sunlight when stored. We will press and refresh your garment free of charge at any KhanSaab atelier.
Complimentary express shipping worldwide. UAE: 1-2 days. Gulf: 2-4 days. Rest of world: 3-7 days. Returns accepted within 30 days. Made-to-measure orders are final sale.

makingSteps.body: A paper pattern is cut to your measurements.
Heavyweight cotton is laid, marked and cut by hand.
60 stitches per cm. By a single artisan.
Pressed, packed and signed on the inner placket.

items.b: The fit is impeccable. Three fittings, one perfect garment. I will not buy a thobe elsewhere again.
Ordered in a panic for my brother's wedding. Arrived on day 12, signed and pressed. Made me cry, honestly.
Compared side by side with three other 'luxury' brands. KhanSaab wins on cloth, stitch and shoulder. Effortless.
